text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Army Commander General Rodolph Haykal visited the Tyre barracks and met with senior officers of the South Litani sector command. He also inspected the Qasmiyeh bridge, which was targeted by Israeli airstrikes overnight. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队指挥官鲁道夫·海卡尔将军访问了提尔兵营，并会见了南利塔尼区指挥部的高级军官。他还视察了卡西米耶桥，该桥夜间遭到了以色列空袭的袭击。@wfwitness

text: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian: The repeated aggression by the Zionist entity against Lebanon is a flagrant violation of the initial ceasefire agreement and a dangerous indicator of deceit and lack of commitment to potential accords. The continuation of these aggressions will render negotiations meaningless; our hands will remain on the trigger, and Iran will never abandon its Lebanese brothers and sisters.
text_zh: 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希基安：犹太复国主义实体对黎巴嫩的反复侵略是对最初停火协议的公然违反，也是欺骗和缺乏对潜在协议承诺的危险信号。这些侵略的持续将使谈判变得毫无意义；我们的手将始终扣在扳机上，伊朗永远不会抛弃其在黎巴嫩的兄弟姐妹。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu said Israel continues to strike Hezbollah with force, precision and determination. In Beiru, he stated that the IDF killed Ali Youssef Harashi, the personal secretary of Hezbollah Secretary‑General Naim Qassem and…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF announced that they killed Maher Qassem Hamdan, commander of the alleged Hezbollah‑financed “Lebanese Companies” group in the Shebaa area of southern Lebanon, along with seven other alleged members who fled to the Sidon area. Hamdan was allegedly responsible for recruiting members, supplying weapons and budgeting the group. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness："⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列将继续以力量、精确和决心打击真主党。在贝鲁特，他表示以色列国防军击毙了真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆的个人秘书阿里·优素福·哈拉希，以及…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，他们在黎巴嫩南部舍巴阿地区击毙了据称由真主党资助的“黎巴嫩公司”组织指挥官马赫·卡西姆·哈姆丹，以及另外七名据称逃往西顿地区的成员。哈姆丹据称负责招募成员、提供武器和编制预算。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 The Israeli military and Shin Bet announced that they have killed Abd al‑Rahman Ammar Hassan Khudri, a Palestinian Islamic Jihad member who allegedly took part in the 7th October 2023 attacks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列军方和辛贝特宣布，他们已击毙阿卜杜勒·拉赫曼·阿马尔·哈桑·库德里，一名据称参与了2023年10月7日袭击的巴勒斯坦伊斯兰圣战组织成员。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf just posted this on X, again. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫刚刚在X上再次发布了这条信息。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel TRUMP reportedly issues Europe an ultimatum: deploy real military forces, including warships, to the Strait of Hormuz within days. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042204703623176387/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon’s Prime Minister Nawaf Salam after the cabinet meeting: "We will immediately begin strengthening state control in the Beirut governorate, and weapons will be held solely by the state across the governorate. Anyone who violates this will be prosecuted according to the law. We are filing a complaint against Israel at the UN Security Council over yesterday’s Israeli attack." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆在内阁会议后表示：“我们将立即开始加强贝鲁特省的国家控制，全省范围内武器将仅由国家持有。任何违反者将依法被起诉。我们就昨日以色列的袭击向联合国安理会提出对以色列的投诉。” 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iran’s parliament speaker issues a statement that Hezbollah is part of the ceasefire agreement, threatens a “STRONG” response if Israel does not stop striking Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042204349544218899/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗议会议长发表声明称真主党是停火协议的一部分，并威胁如果以色列不停止打击黎巴嫩，将作出“强烈”回应。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042204349544218899/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s 10-point plan is now described as outdated and pushed to media as a misinformation effort, with critics saying outlets ran with it uncritically. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042203560423637316/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗的十点计划现被描述为过时，并被作为虚假信息努力推向媒体，批评者称媒体不加批判地跟进。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042203560423637316/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Watch how Hezbollah continues launching rockets from Lebanon. The launchers and rockets are hidden inside homes and fired within minutes. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042202699899298226/video/1 tweet

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Ireland's government deploys the Army to remove protesters' vehicles, as Deputy Commissioner Shawna Coxon warns truckers, farmers, and business owners protesting fuel prices and taxes, that they must "immediately cease blockades... or face the full rigors of the law." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042202275423097304/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan claims it is working to broker ceasefires in Lebanon and Yemen, with a source saying: “It will be discussed… and we will settle it.” - Reuters tweet

text: Disclose.tv NOW - UK Defense secretary says 3 Russian submarines were in UK waters, "To President Putin I say, we see you, we see your activity over our cables and our pipelines, and you should know that any attempt to damage them will not be tolerated and will have serious consequences." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042201949257244970/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 即时 - 英国国防大臣表示，3艘俄罗斯潜艇曾进入英国水域，“我对普京总统说，我们看到你了，我们看到你在我们的电缆和管道上方的活动，你应该知道，任何试图破坏它们的企图都不会被容忍，并将带来严重后果。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042201949257244970/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel European Commission spokesperson says freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz must be guaranteed without any fees or tolls. tweet

text: Open Source Intel IDF & Shin Bet statement: Eliminated Islamic Jihad terrorist Abd al-Rahman Khudari, who infiltrated Kibbutz Nir Oz on October 7 and was planning an attack on IDF troops in northern Gaza. 3 additional Hamas operatives were also eliminated. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042200451827765737/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报以色列国防军与辛贝特声明：击毙了伊斯兰圣战组织恐怖分子阿卜杜勒·拉赫曼·库达里，他于10月7日潜入尼尔奥兹基布兹，并计划在加沙北部袭击以色列国防军部队。另有3名哈马斯成员被击毙。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042200451827765737/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 The director of the Russian state nuclear corporation said Rosatom is ready for bilateral and trilateral cooperation to resolve the issue of Iran’s enriched uranium. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 俄罗斯国家核能公司负责人表示，俄罗斯国家原子能公司已准备好进行双边和三边合作，以解决伊朗浓缩铀问题。@wfwitness

text: Q: Do you agree that NATO countries, some of them, were tested and failed? Mark Rutte: Some of them, yes...
text_zh: 问：你是否同意一些北约国家经受了考验却失败了？马克·吕特：其中一些，确实……

text: 🇬🇧 UK Defense Secretary is upset about Russian submarines. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇬🇧 英国国防大臣对俄罗斯潜艇感到不安。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇵🇰 Iranian parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said Lebanon and the entire Resistance Axis are an inseparable part of the ceasefire, citing point one of Iran’s 10‑point proposal. He noted that Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif publicly stressed the Lebanon issue, leaving no room for denial. Ghalibaf warned that ceasefire violations carry explicit costs and will be met with strong responses. “Extinguish the fire immediately,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇵🇰 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴盖尔·加利巴夫表示，黎巴嫩及整个抵抗轴心是停火不可分割的一部分，并援引伊朗十点提案的第一点。他指出，巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫公开强调了黎巴嫩问题，不容否认。加利巴夫警告称，违反停火将带来明确代价，并将遭到强力回击。“立即扑灭火势，”他说。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah claimed further rocket attacks on Thursday in response to Israeli ceasefire violations, targeting Avivim (12:00), the Ajal hill north of Kfar Yuval (12:00), Kiryat Shmona for the fifth time (12:15), and Shomera (13:00). @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党声称于周四发动进一步火箭弹袭击，以回应以色列违反停火行为，目标包括阿维维姆（12:00）、克法尔尤瓦尔北部的阿贾勒山（12:00）、第五次袭击的基亚特什莫纳（12:15）以及肖梅拉（13:00）。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun said at the start of a cabinet meeting that Lebanon is tired of statements of condemnation, and had hoped the ceasefire would include the country, but heard disappointing statements instead. He said Lebanon is conducting contacts with friends abroad to demand a ceasefire and negotiations, and to press for Lebanon to be part of the agreement. “We are a state with its own entity, and we are the ones who negotiate – we do not accept anyone else negotiating on our behalf,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩总统米歇尔·奥恩在内阁会议开始时表示，黎巴嫩已厌倦谴责声明，曾希望停火能涵盖该国，却听到令人失望的言论。他说，黎巴嫩正与海外朋友进行接触，要求停火和谈判，并敦促将黎巴嫩纳入协议。“我们是一个拥有自主实体的国家，我们自行谈判——不接受任何他人代表我们谈判，”他表示。@wfwitness

text: Iran's Ghalibaf: Lebanon and Iran’s allied groups are formally included in the ceasefire framework. Pakistan’s PM Shehbaz Sharif publicly reinforced that this position is firm and non-negotiable. Ceasefire violations carry explicit costs and STRONG responses. Extinguish the fire immediately.
text_zh: 伊朗的加利巴夫：黎巴嫩及伊朗的盟友团体正式被纳入停火框架。巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫公开强调这一立场坚定且不可谈判。违反停火将带来明确代价和强力回应。立即扑灭火势。

text: 🇦🇺 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Australian PM Anthony Albanese: The Australian government also firmly believes that the ceasefire has to apply to Lebanon as well.
text_zh: 🇦🇺 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 澳大利亚总理安东尼·阿尔巴尼斯：澳大利亚政府也坚定认为，停火必须同样适用于黎巴嫩。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Drone strikes were reported in the towns of Harouf and Deir al‑Zahrani in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 据报道，黎巴嫩南部哈鲁夫和代尔扎赫拉尼镇发生无人机袭击。@wfwitness

text: A photo of a U.S. Navy sailor aboard the aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford wearing a patch reading “Join the U.S. Navy — Save the Big Booty Venezuelans!” briefly appeared on the Pentagon’s official DVIDS platform before being deleted.
text_zh: 一张美国海军水兵在杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰上佩戴着写有“加入美国海军——拯救大屁股委内瑞拉人！”字样的臂章照片，短暂出现在五角大楼官方DVIDS平台后已被删除。

text: A US Navy MQ-4C Triton surveillance drone suddenly turned toward Iran, squawked emergency code 7700, rapidly descended, and disappeared from public tracking over the Strait of Hormuz. An MQ-4C Triton costs more than $200 million per aircraft.
text_zh: 一架美国海军MQ-4C“特里同”侦察无人机突然转向伊朗，发出7700紧急代码，迅速下降，并在霍尔木兹海峡上空从公共追踪中消失。每架MQ-4C“特里同”造价超过2亿美元。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The Iranian Embassy in London welcomed the UK’s support for a ceasefire but reminded that the Strait of Hormuz was open before the illegal aggression by the United States and the "Zionist regime" – an aggression that Britain did not condemn. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗驻伦敦大使馆对英国支持停火表示欢迎，但提醒道，霍尔木兹海峡在美国和“犹太复国主义政权”非法侵略之前是开放的——而英国并未谴责这一侵略行为。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Reuters: An Israeli military official said the Litani River will not form a new border with Lebanon. Israel will monitor the buffer zone with ground forces that carry out raids without the need for a permanent military presence. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 路透社：一名以色列军方官员表示，利塔尼河不会成为与黎巴嫩的新边界。以色列将通过执行突袭任务的地面部队监控缓冲区，无需永久性军事存在。@wfwitness

text: Keir Starmer: Our Armed Forces are among the best in the world.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：我们的军队是世界顶尖之一。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇳 Lebanon’s Information Minister Paul Morcos announced that the Lebanese cabinet has decided to file a complaint with the UN Security Council following Israel’s "dangerous escalation." He said the preliminary toll of yesterday’s Israeli airstrikes on Lebanon stands at 203 dead and 1,078 wounded. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇳 黎巴嫩信息部长保罗·莫尔科斯宣布，在以色列“危险升级”后，黎巴嫩内阁决定向联合国安理会提出申诉。他表示，昨日以色列对黎巴嫩空袭的初步伤亡人数为203人死亡，1,078人受伤。@wfwitness

text: Keir Starmer: I am determined to protect the British people from paying the price for Putin’s aggression in their household bills. That is why we will not shy away from taking action and exposing Russia’s destabilising activity that seeks to test our resolve.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：我决心保护英国人民，不让他们为普京的侵略行为在家庭账单上付出代价。因此，我们将毫不犹豫地采取行动，揭露俄罗斯旨在考验我们决心的破坏稳定活动。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has fired approximately 30 rockets from Lebanon at northern Israel since this morning, the IDF said. There have been no reports of injuries or damage as the rockets were either intercepted or struck open areas. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness："⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对峙线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军称，自今早以来，真主党已从黎巴嫩向以色列北部发射约30枚火箭弹。目前尚无人员伤亡或财产损失报告，火箭弹或被拦截，或击中了空旷区域。@wfwitness

text: Russia’s main oil tax revenue is set to double to about $9 billion in April after the Iran war pushed global oil prices above $100. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 在伊朗战争推动全球油价突破每桶100美元后，俄罗斯4月份的主要石油税收收入预计将翻倍至约90亿美元。来源：路透社

text: The UK deployed its military, with support from Norway, to track and deter Russian submarines operating near critical undersea cables and pipelines. Defence Secretary John Healey said the mission exposed the activity and warned Putin that any threat to infrastructure would face serious consequences.
text_zh: 英国在挪威支持下部署军队，以追踪并威慑在关键海底电缆和管道附近活动的俄罗斯潜艇。国防大臣约翰·希利表示，此次任务揭露了相关活动，并警告普京，任何对基础设施的威胁都将面临严重后果。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇱🇱🇧 A Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman stated that an Iranian delegation will travel to peace talks in Islamabad today, but will participate only if Israel halts all attacks on Lebanon. Any peace in the region must include Lebanon, and the coming…" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Reuters: A Pakistani source familiar with the discussions said Pakistan is working to secure a ceasefire on the Lebanese and Yemeni fronts. The Lebanese and Yemeni fronts will be discussed during the talks, and a solution will be reached regarding them. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness："⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇱🇱🇧 伊朗外交部发言人表示，伊朗代表团将于今日前往伊斯兰堡参加和平谈判，但前提是以色列停止对黎巴嫩的一切攻击。该地区的任何和平都必须包含黎巴嫩，接下来……" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 路透社：一位熟悉讨论的巴基斯坦消息人士称，巴基斯坦正努力确保黎巴嫩和也门战线达成停火。黎巴嫩和也门战线将在谈判期间讨论，并将就相关问题达成解决方案。@wfwitness

text: 🇦🇪 🇮🇱 Herzi Halevi at Sheikh Zayed Mosque in Abu Dhabi.
text_zh: 🇦🇪 🇮🇱 赫尔齐·哈勒维在阿布扎比的谢赫扎耶德清真寺。

You may remember Ali and Steve from when they were targeted in a Zionist airstrike while reporting in southern Lebanon. ➡️ Make sure to

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷🇮🇱⚡Hanzala releases more personal information about former Israeli army chief of staff Herzi Halevi." 🇮🇱 🇶🇦 The Handala hacker group has hacked into the phone of former IOF chief of staff Herzi Halevi, revealing for the first time that he secretly visited Qatar and met with Emir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像："🇮🇷🇮🇱⚡️ 汉扎拉公布了更多关于以色列前陆军参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的个人信息。" 🇮🇱 🇶🇦 汉达拉黑客组织入侵了以色列前国防军参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的手机，首次揭露他曾秘密访问卡塔尔并与埃米尔谢赫塔米姆·本·哈马德·阿勒萨尼会面。

text: On 8 April 2026, Israeli airstrikes hit areas near the Belgian embassy in Beirut while Foreign Minister Maxime Prévot was present. He described the day as “one of the bloodiest in recent times” for Lebanon.
text_zh: 2026年4月8日，以色列空袭击中贝鲁特比利时大使馆附近区域，当时外交部长马克西姆·普雷沃在场。他称这一天是黎巴嫩“近年来最血腥的日子之一”。

text: BIG: Trump has effectively given Europe an ultimatum: within days, they must commit actual military forces—like warships—to the Strait of Hormuz. Source: Der Spiegel
text_zh: 重磅：特朗普实际上已向欧洲发出最后通牒：数日内，他们必须向霍尔木兹海峡派遣实际军事力量——如军舰。来源：明镜周刊
